hero_description: Master the art and science of nail care with our comprehensive Pedicure & Manicure Specialist course. Learn professional techniques, hygiene standards, and customer service skills to launch a rewarding career in India's booming beauty industry. This hands-on program combines theoretical knowledge with intensive practical training to make you job-ready in just 4 weeks.
overview_description: This foundation-level course equips you with essential skills in manicure and pedicure services, nail health, product knowledge, sanitation protocols, and professional client management. You'll gain practical experience in nail art, color application, nail treatments, and business basics—preparing you for immediate employment in salons, spas, or launching your own beauty business across India.

modules.title: Fundamentals of Nail Care & Anatomy
topics: Nail structure and anatomy — Understanding nail plate, nail bed, cuticle, lunula, and free edge; how nails grow and factors affecting nail health
Nail types and conditions — Identifying healthy nails, brittle nails, weak nails, fungal infections, psoriasis, and common nail disorders in Indian climate
Skin anatomy of hands and feet — Structure of epidermis, dermis, and subcutaneous layers; understanding pressure points and sensitive areas
Common nail problems and solutions — Addressing peeling nails, discoloration, ridges, white spots, and hangnails; when to refer clients to dermatologists
Nail growth cycle — Anagen, catagen, and telogen phases; why nails grow faster in summer; impact of nutrition and health on nail growth
Contraindications and safety — Identifying when NOT to perform services; recognizing infections, open wounds, and skin conditions requiring medical attention
Product ingredients and chemistry — Understanding base coats, top coats, nail polish, gels, acrylics, and natural nail care products used in India
Health and wellness connection — How nail health reflects overall health; vitamin deficiencies and their nail symptoms; importance of hydration and nutrition

modules.title: Sanitation, Sterilization & Safety Protocols
topics: Salon hygiene standards — Setting up clean, hygienic workstations; daily cleaning routines; maintaining salon environment as per Indian beauty salon guidelines
Hand hygiene and personal protective equipment — Proper handwashing techniques, wearing gloves, masks, aprons; preventing cross-contamination between clients
Tool sterilization methods — Autoclaving, chemical disinfection (using barbicide and sanitizing solutions); proper storage of sterilized instruments; frequency of sterilization
Disinfection vs sterilization — Understanding differences; which tools need sterilization vs disinfection; complying with Indian salon regulations
Waste management and disposal — Proper disposal of nail clippings, cotton, contaminated materials; following environmental and health guidelines
Client health screening — Pre-service consultation to identify contraindications; maintaining client health records; documentation practices
Bloodborne pathogen awareness — Understanding transmission risks; protocols if accidental cuts occur; first aid for minor injuries during service
Salon licensing and compliance — Understanding local beauty salon registration requirements in India; GST and business compliance; client consent forms
Personal health and grooming — Maintaining professional appearance; staying healthy to avoid transmitting infections; mental health awareness in high-stress salon environment
Emergency procedures — Basic first aid; handling allergic reactions to nail products; knowing when to call medical help; emergency contact protocols

modules.title: Manicure Services & Techniques
topics: Manicure service types — Basic manicure, French manicure, gel manicure, acrylic nails, ombre nails, nail art designs; understanding Indian client preferences and seasonal trends
Tools and equipment for manicure — Nail files (metal, glass, crystal), buffers, cuticle pushers, nail clippers, dremels, UV/LED lamps; selecting right tools for different nail types
Step-by-step basic manicure procedure — Greeting client, hand soaking, nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage, base coat, polish application, top coat; timing and efficiency
Nail shaping techniques — Understanding nail shapes (square, oval, almond, coffin, stiletto); choosing appropriate shapes for hand size and client lifestyle; using proper filing angles
Cuticle care and management — Pushing back vs cutting cuticles; using cuticle oil and creams; treating dry, damaged, or infected cuticles; preventing ingrown nails
Hand and arm massage techniques — Pressure points on hands and forearms; relaxation strokes; improving circulation; making clients feel pampered; massage duration and pressure
Polish application techniques — Achieving smooth, even coats; preventing bubbles and streaks; managing wet polish; drying techniques; polish removal and reapplication
Gel and acrylic application — Understanding UV-cured gels vs LED gels; application process; curing times; removal techniques; aftercare instructions for extended wear
Nail art and design — Basic designs (stripes, dots, ombre); using nail art tools and brushes; applying decals and gems; creating trending designs popular in India
Color selection and matching — Understanding skin undertones (warm, cool, neutral); recommending colors based on occasion, season, and client preference; trending colors in Indian market
Problem-solving during service — Fixing chips, managing weak nails, dealing with sensitive clients, addressing client dissatisfaction; building client loyalty
Aftercare and maintenance advice — How long manicure lasts; tips to prevent chipping; product recommendations; scheduling follow-up appointments; upselling services

modules.title: Pedicure Services & Techniques
topics: Pedicure service types — Basic pedicure, medical pedicure, gel pedicure, spa pedicure, foot reflexology pedicure; understanding Indian climate impact on foot care
Foot and leg anatomy — Foot structure, arches, pressure points, reflexology zones; common foot problems in hot Indian climate (cracking, fungal infections, calluses)
Tools and equipment for pedicure — Foot files, pumice stones, foot scrapers, toe separators, pedicure tubs, foot spa machines; selecting appropriate tools for different foot conditions
Foot soaking and softening — Choosing water temperature; using foot soaks with salts, essential oils, and herbs; softening calluses and dead skin; duration and benefits
Callus and dead skin removal — Using foot files and scrapers safely; avoiding over-removal; treating diabetic feet with care; managing thick, hardened skin
Toenail care procedures — Cutting toenails straight across to prevent ingrown nails; filing edges; managing thick or fungal nails; proper nail length and shape
Foot massage techniques — Pressure point massage, reflexology basics; calf massage; improving circulation; relaxation strokes; managing client comfort on pedicure chairs
Exfoliation and skin treatment — Using foot masks, scrubs, and peels; treating dry, cracked heels; managing fungal issues; recommending home care products
Polish application on toenails — Applying base coat, polish, and top coat to toenails; managing larger nail surface area; preventing smudging during drying
Pedicure chair operation — Setting up pedicure tub; adjusting temperature and jets; maintaining cleanliness between clients; troubleshooting equipment issues
Foot health conditions — Identifying athlete's foot, nail fungus, bunions, corns, warts; knowing when to refer to podiatrist; contraindications for pedicure service
Aftercare and foot care advice — Keeping feet dry and clean; using foot powders; wearing appropriate footwear; scheduling regular pedicures; preventing fungal infections in monsoon season

modules.title: Customer Service & Professional Communication
topics: Client consultation and communication — Active listening; asking right questions about preferences, lifestyle, and budget; understanding client expectations before starting service
Building client relationships — Creating welcoming atmosphere; remembering client preferences; personalizing service; building repeat clientele and loyalty
Managing difficult clients — Handling complaints professionally; managing expectations; offering solutions; when to involve salon manager; maintaining composure
Professional etiquette and grooming — Dressing appropriately; maintaining good hygiene; speaking clearly; avoiding gossip; respecting client privacy and confidentiality
Pricing and payment handling — Understanding service pricing; explaining costs to clients; handling cash and digital payments; managing tips professionally
Appointment scheduling and management — Using salon booking systems; managing time efficiently; respecting client schedules; handling cancellations and no-shows
Product recommendations and upselling — Suggesting complementary products (cuticle oils, hand creams, foot creams); explaining benefits; building additional revenue
Handling client health concerns — Identifying allergies and sensitivities; documenting client health history; recommending patch tests; knowing when to refer to medical professionals
Multilingual communication — Basic communication in Hindi, regional languages, and English; understanding client needs across diverse Indian clientele; cultural sensitivity
Feedback and continuous improvement — Accepting constructive feedback; improving service quality; tracking client satisfaction; participating in salon training sessions

modules.title: Business Basics & Career Development
topics: Starting your own beauty business — Registration and licensing requirements in India; understanding salon setup costs; choosing location; basic business planning
Pricing strategies — Understanding cost of products and services; calculating profit margins; competitive pricing in local market; seasonal pricing adjustments
Financial management basics — Maintaining income and expense records; understanding GST for beauty services; managing cash flow; creating simple business budget
Building clientele and marketing — Using social media (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp); word-of-mouth marketing; offering introductory discounts; loyalty programs; local advertising
Professional development and upskilling — Pursuing advanced certifications; attending beauty workshops; learning new nail art trends; staying updated with international techniques
Salon employment vs self-employment — Understanding employment contracts; commission-based work; salon commission rates in India; building independent client base
Legal and regulatory compliance — Understanding beauty industry regulations in your state; GST registration; maintaining client records; insurance requirements
Health and wellness for professionals — Managing repetitive strain injury; maintaining posture; taking breaks; mental health awareness; work-life balance in beauty industry
Entrepreneurship opportunities — Opening nail salon chains; becoming beauty trainer; creating online beauty courses; franchise opportunities in Indian beauty sector
Industry trends and innovation — Following nail art trends; understanding eco-friendly products; organic and vegan nail products; technology in beauty services; online booking platforms

assessment.practical_format: Hands-on demonstration of manicure and pedicure services on live models with assessment of technique, hygiene, client service, and final output quality

practical_items.title: Complete Manicure Service
practical_items.description: Candidate must perform full manicure on a live model including hand washing, nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage, base coat application, polish application, and top coat with proper technique and hygiene standards

practical_items.title: Complete Pedicure Service
practical_items.description: Candidate must perform full pedicure on a live model including foot soaking, callus removal, toenail care, foot massage, polish application with proper foot care, hygiene, and finishing touches

eligibility: Minimum age: 14 years (or as per local regulations)
Minimum education: Class 8th pass or equivalent
No prior experience required; beginners welcome
Already working in beauty industry? Apply for RPL (Recognition of Prior Learning) exam
Valid government ID proof required at registration (Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID, Passport)
Physical fitness required (ability to stand for extended periods)
No serious allergies to nail products (patch test recommended)
Applicable for all genders and candidates across India
learning_outcomes: Perform professional manicure and pedicure services following Indian salon standards and hygiene protocols
Identify nail conditions, contraindications, and when to refer clients to medical professionals
Apply proper sterilization and sanitation procedures to prevent infections and cross-contamination
Provide excellent customer service, manage client expectations, and build long-term client relationships
Execute nail art designs, color selection, and product application techniques with precision
Start and manage your own beauty business or secure employment in salons and spas across India
